scripts.dev:doppler: doppler run --project locus-t-ai-backend --config dev -- next dev
scripts.build:doppler: doppler run --project locus-t-ai-backend --config prd -- next build
scripts.start:doppler: doppler run --project locus-t-ai-backend --config prd -- next start
scripts.check: corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build
